---
title: "Ethel Anderdon Luke"
---

## Ethel Anderdon Luke

**Dates:** (1862-1897)

### Description

pupil of Marion Finlaison

### Biography

It is not certain that the Ethel Luke, pupil of Finlaison, referred to by CMY in 1879 is this person, but she seems the most likely candidate. She was the daughter of the Rev. William Henry Colbeck Luke, Vicar of St. Matthias, Earls Court, and she married (1895) George Herbert Munn.

### Letters

- Letter from June 5th 1879

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
